pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes application files to /home/ga/todo-app.
setup_task.sh builds the unoptimized application using the image tag todo-app:original.
export_result.sh checks for the image todo-app:optimized and evaluates its size and functionality.
setup_task.sh generates index.js which listens on port 3000 by default, and export_result.sh runs the image with -p 13000:3000.
verifier.py verifies if the optimized image size is strictly less than 250 MB (awards maximum points if so).

privileged_info_summary: The web application is located in /home/ga/todo-app. The initial, bloated image is tagged as todo-app:original. The optimized multi-stage build image must be tagged as todo-app:optimized and must be smaller than 250 MB for full credit. The application internally listens on port 3000, which is verified by running the container and testing the health endpoint.
